# nps_workshop_settings_mcp_server (Resource)

The `nps_workshop_settings_mcp_server` resource manages the MCP server settings for Workshop. This is a singleton resource — one per tenant. The initial apply imports any existing values; subsequent applies push the configured values. Destroying the resource removes it from state without modifying the server.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "nps_workshop_settings_mcp_server" "settings" {
  enabled    = true
  read_write = false
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether the MCP server is enabled.
- `read_write` (Boolean) Whether the MCP server allows read-write operations. If false, the server is read-only.
